# juju_model (List Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
list "juju_model" "this" {
  provider         = juju
  include_resource = true

  config {
    model_uuid = "<model-uuid>"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `model_uuid` (String) Filter results to a specific model UUID.
